name: Solid Pod Memory
description: Store agent memory in the user's own Solid pod (RDF-native, portable, owner-owned, cross-agent) via @jeswr/solid-memory.
author: Jesse Wright

container.description: Absolute http(s) Solid container URL the memories live under. REQUIRED.

agentWebId.description: The producing agent's WebID — prov:wasAttributedTo on every stored memory (NOT anonymized). Optional.

defaultGeneratedBy.description: A default generating-conversation IRI (prov:wasGeneratedBy) for a store that omits its own. Optional.

defaultLimit.description: Default recall result cap when a tool call omits `limit`.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store a memory in the user's Solid pod.

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: Recall stored memories matching a free-text query.

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: Fetch a single memory by its id (pod URL).

tools.name: memory_forget
tools.description: Forget (delete) a memory by its id (pod URL).
